title: rubus odoratus var. californicus
intro: Rubus odoratus var. californicus, also known as the California fragrant raspberry or California thimbleberry, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family, with a unique combination of fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The health benefits of Rubus odoratus var. californicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
